items.title: Blunt-speaking Pope tells Cameroon to root out corruption to find peace
items.dek: The pontiff was unusually forthright in his address at the presidential palace.
items.body: The pontiff was unusually forthright in his address at the presidential palace.

items.title: Brazil's former spy chief released from ICE detention
items.dek: Bolsonaro ally Alexandre Ramagem was stopped by immigration agents in Orlando, Florida on Monday.

items.title: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
items.dek: Keba Seba is known for opposing French influence in Africa and backing West Africa's military leaders.
items.body: Keba Seba is known for opposing French influence in Africa and backing West Africa's military leaders.
